languages.label: javascript
Ruby
languages.code:
require "uri"
require "json"
require "net/http"

url = URI("https://api.hyperzod.app/admin/v1/merchant/update")

https = Net::HTTP.new(url.host, url.port)
https.use_ssl = true

request = Net::HTTP::Post.new(url)
request["accept"] = "application/json"
request["content-type"] = "application/json"
request["x-api-key"] = "{{X-API-KEY}}"
request["x-tenant"] = "{{X-TENANT}}"
request.body = JSON.dump({
   "id": "",
   "slug": "",
   "language_translation": [
      {}
   ],
   "name": "",
   "address": "",
   "post_code": "",
   "country_code": "",
   "country": "",
   "state": "",
   "city": "",
   "phone": "",
   "email": "",
   "merchant_category_ids": [],
   "accepted_order_types": [],
   "status": 0,
   "delivery_by": "",
   "owner_name": "",
   "owner_phone": "",
   "commission": {
      "type": "",
      "value": "",
      "calculate_on_status": 0
   },
   "tax_method": "",
   "type": ""
})

response = https.request(request)
puts response.read_body

languages.label: Python
languages.code:
import requests
import json

url = "https://api.hyperzod.app/admin/v1/merchant/update"

payload = json.dumps({
   "id": "",
   "slug": "",
   "language_translation": [
      {}
   ],
   "name": "",
   "address": "",
   "post_code": "",
   "country_code": "",
   "country": "",
   "state": "",
   "city": "",
   "phone": "",
   "email": "",
   "merchant_category_ids": [],
   "accepted_order_types": [],
   "status": 0,
   "delivery_by": "",
   "owner_name": "",
   "owner_phone": "",
   "commission": {
      "type": "",
      "value": "",
      "calculate_on_status": 0
   },
   "tax_method": "",
   "type": ""
})
headers = {
   'accept': 'application/json',
   'content-type': 'application/json',
   'x-api-key': '{{X-API-KEY}}',
   'x-tenant': '{{X-TENANT}}'
}

response = requests.request("POST", url, headers=headers, data=payload)

print(response.text)

languages.label: Python
languages.code:
import requests
import json

url = "https://api.hyperzod.app/admin/v1/merchant/update"

payload = json.dumps({
   "id": "",
   "slug": "",
   "language_translation": [
      {}
   ],
   "name": "",
   "address": "",
   "post_code": "",
   "country_code": "",
   "country": "",
   "state": "",
   "city": "",
   "phone": "",
   "email": "",
   "merchant_category_ids": [],
   "accepted_order_types": [],
   "status": 0,
   "delivery_by": "",
   "owner_name": "",
   "owner_phone": "",
   "commission": {
      "type": "",
      "value": "",
      "calculate_on_status": 0
   },
   "tax_method": "",
   "type": ""
})
headers = {
   'accept': 'application/json',
   'content-type': 'application/json',
   'x-api-key': '{{X-API-KEY}}',
   'x-tenant': '{{X-TENANT}}'
}

response = requests.request("POST", url, headers=headers, data=payload)

print(response.text)
